display_information.name: Precedent
display_information.description: The decision memory your team and its agents can trust.
display_information.long_description: Precedent records what your team decided, why, and what it rejected — grounded in links to the source messages. When a decision is later overturned, Precedent knows, so recall always returns the current call. Other agents can ask has_this_been_decided() before they act.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ask what the team decided, with receipts.

slash_commands.description: Ask what the team decided, with the receipts

shortcuts.name: Log this decision
shortcuts.description: Capture this message or thread as a decision
